title: arequipa aurantiaca
intro: Arequipa aurantiaca is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Arequipa aurantiaca include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
